_setup_instructions.search_roots: Space-separated source directories to scan, relative to the project being checked (default: 'app src components'). If none exist, the whole project is scanned.
_setup_instructions.skill_rules_dir: Path used in report links pointing to the expo-ios-hig rule files (default: '../expo-ios-hig/references'). Set to the location where the expo-ios-hig skill is installed so links resolve.
